author: y4rr
content: Pass 2A APPROVE (clean). GPU conv2d_f32 supports groups + dilation natively. CPU-detour gate at nn/src/conv.rs:583 removed. PTX kernel rewritten with channel_offset + dilation; driver loops per-group with reusable weight scratch (zero extra copies on dense path). New test conv2d_groups_dilation_native_gpu compares GPU output vs structurally-distinct CPU reference (direct nested loops, NOT shared im2col) at F32_ELEMENTWISE tolerance for groups=2 dilation=(2,2). Sabotage demos: dilation-ignore caught via shape mismatch [2,6,11,11] vs [2,6,9,9]; channel_offset=0 caught via element 243 diff=0.65 >> 1e-5. GPU: 723 PASS (was 722, +1). NN/core/vision all green. cargo build --workspace clean. No new deps.
